title: Master Hong Shan
content:
Master Hong Shan
 is one of the few 
Arcane Void
 cultivators inside the 
Sealed Realm
.

Background
[
]

In the past, he made a deal with 
Lord of the Sealed Realm
 to fight for the Sealed Realm when the 
Realm-Sealing Formation
 is breached.

History
[
]

Book Ten
[
]

While 
Wang Lin
 was battling 
Daoist Water
, he appeared along with 
Master South Cloud
 to spectate. However, when Daoist Water attempted to self-destruct the Golden Bell and destroy the 
Cloud Sea Star System
, he rushed to stop him.

He was the first to accept and proclaim Wang Lin as the new Lord of the Sealed Realm.

After the 
Outer Realm
 cultivators breached the Realm Sealing Formation, he appeared to battle them. He killed thousands of Outer Realm cultivators in an instant and almost killed 
Esteemed Nan Zhao
. After learning of his identity, 
Master Enlighten East
, 
Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor
, two other 
Nirvana Void
 cultivators and, even, Esteemed Nan Zhao attacked him together.

For some time Master Hong Shan managed to stall the five until he fell in 
Grandmaster Yun Luo
's trap and was sneak-attacked by the Sixth Concubine. Furthermore, 
Ice Boy
 appeared to continue holding him back. This allowed the Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor to leave and confront Wang Lin who was rushing to kill Grandmaster Yun Luo. However, the former was easily sliced in half by the 
Heaven-Splitting Axe
 in Wang Lin's possession.

Ice Boy decided Wang Lin had to be stopped and forcibly sent Esteemed Nan Zhao and a Nirvana void cultivator from Bai Lei Clan out of the encirclement to kill Wang Lin. However, Wang Lin retaliated with a poison sneak-attack upon Esteemed Nan Zhao that resulted in the latter's death. The Nirvana void cultivator from Bai Lei Clan was too terrified to attempt to block Wang Lin and escaped.

After Wang Lin was injured by Li Guang's Boy and escaped along with the Nether Beast, the war turned for the worse for the Sealed Realm. Before the Sealed Realm's Third Step cultivators could destroy the 
Seven-Colored Realms
, the Outer Realm waged another war. Master Hong Shan was ambushed in the the Seven-Colored Realm in the Summoned River Star System and was sealed inside a Dao Fruit.

A few decades later, Wang Lin appeared along with 
Qing Shui
 and 
Master Long Pan
 and freed Master Hong Shan from the Dao Fruit. Moreover, they also managed to capture the Heaven Punishment Palace Lord 
Qing Jiuyan
.
